steps.t: Lethi can be found near Hakal-kúnug, the Twisted Stair within Barad-dûr. You should talk to Lethi.
Ashaug can be found near Hakal-kúnug, the Twisted Stair within Barad-dûr. Ashaug has sustained a grave wound in the fighting within Barad-dûr, but his…
Abandoned weapons can be found near the slain Orcs near Hakal-kúnug, the Twisted Stair within Barad-dûr. You should find a suitable weapon with which …
Lethi can be found in Barad-dûr. You have taken a weapon. You should talk to Lethi and follow him to the gates of Barad-dûr.
The pale creature can be found in Barad-dûr. Despite appearing to be dead, the pale creature has scrambled to its feet and attacked Lethi. You should …
Lethi can be found in Barad-dûr. After repelling the pale creature that attacked him, Lethi is shaken. You should talk to Lethi before pressing on to …
Lethi has travelled into the shadowed halls of Barad-dûr. You should follow Lethi and press on to the gates of Barad-dûr.
Lethi can be found Barad-dûr. Lethi is standing next to a brazier in Barad-dûr. You should talk to Lethi.
The slain Orc-captain can be found just ahead of Lethi in Barad-dûr. After spying a slain Orc-captain, Lethi has urged you to disguise yourself in its…
Lethi can be found in Barad-dûr. You have disguised yourself as an Orc-captain, which may be of help in escaping the Land of Mordor. You should talk t…
The path to the gates of Barad-dûr is just ahead of you. Lethi has asked you to peer around the corner and see if the path out of Barad-dûr is clear.
Lethi can be found in Barad-dûr. You discovered the uruk, Ushgrat, guarding the gates of Barad-dûr. Worse still, he appears to have subdued Vaski. You…
After foiling Vaski's escape, Ushgrat is keeping watch before the gates of Barad-dûr. You should confront Ushgrat and fight your way out of Barad-dûr.
Lethi and Vaski have drawn Ushgrat's attention away from you. You must escape from Barad-dûr before it is too late!
Nagli can be found at the Rusted Gate in Ered Luin. After you told the Dourhands of your escape from Mordor, a dwarf named Nagli has asked to speak wi…
Rethvárd can be found at the Rusted Gate in Ered Luin. Nagli has brought you before Rethvárd, a Dourhand guard, with the hope that he might grant you …
Skorgrím Dourhand can be found at the Rusted Gate in Ered Luin. Followed by a significant number of Dourhands, and a deathly-looking Man, Skorgrím has…
Dourhands can be found at the Rusted Gate in Ered Luin. Skorgrím Dourhand claims to have been resurrected by a deathly-looking Man called Ivar the Blo…
Rethvárd can be found at the Rusted Gate in Ered Luin. None of the other Dourhands you warned could be swayed from following Skorgrím. You should warn…
Nagli can be found at the Rusted Gate in Ered Luin. All of the Dourhands save for Nagli have left with Skorgrím. You should talk to Nagli.
Nagli has told you of a dwarf named Dwalin, who led the recent Longbeard expedition to Thorin's Hall. Hoping to learn the truth of Skorgrím's claims a…
Dwalin can be found somewhere within Thorin's Hall. After entering Thorin's Hall, the Longbeards have kept a close watch on Nagli. You should find and…
Dwalin can be found in Thorin's Hall. You have found Dwalin deep within Thorin's Hall. You should speak to him on behalf of Nagli and plead for refuge…
